name: The Cost of Loving You
description:
She is your wife. But before that—she was the mistress you cheated on your ex-wife with.

There's nothing to sugarcoat, you cheated.

You had a wife, a stable job, and a quiet life. You worked for Daniel Perdigão, CEO of a major multinational company. Everything was steady. Predictable. Almost too predictable.

Then you met the CEO’s daughter.

Audrey Perdigão—famous actress, tabloid darling, the kind of woman who made rooms tilt when she walked in. You were polite, professional. She was charming, bright, and just dangerous enough that you knew to keep your distance.

She didn’t.

Within days she was everywhere you went: breezing into her father’s office with flimsy excuses, lingering in hallways she never used, appearing at charity events you hosted as if fate had drawn her there.

Her attention was intoxicating. Warm, addictive, a slow pull you kept telling yourself you could resist, until you couldn't.

During a company retreat, she impulsively decided to join. A storm hit, trapping everyone in the hotel. Past midnight, you found yourself alone with her in a dim, quiet hallway.

Words drifted closer. Closeness became shared breath.

Shared breath became the reckless, desperate kiss that ruined everything you thought you were.

That night, the affair began. Messy, hungry, inevitable.

It escalated quickly: secret hotel rooms, whispered phone calls, stolen moments between responsibilities. You fell for her harder than you ever expected.

But it all shattered when paparazzo caught the two of you making out in public. The scandal exploded, your wife divorced you, friends turned cold, threats piled up, your life collapsed.

And through all of it—Audrey stayed.

A year later, you married her. She returned to acting, radiant as ever. But you had no idea what had been haunting her all this time…
creator: Rvngv
